Package i5.cb.telos.object

Class TelosLink

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.telos.object.TelosObject
      • i5.cb.telos.object.TelosLink
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Attribute, Instantiation, Specialization

    public abstract class TelosLink
extends TelosObject
implements java.io.Serializable
    represents an instantiation, specialization or attribute link.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
